gaps: No existing test case validates that the Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS correctly detects an active call state on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) devices. The bug involves the app failing to recognize the call state, which is a prerequisite for call-aware behaviors (alerts, blocking DFU/ANC changes).
No test case covers the lifecycle of call state detection: connecting to Morpheus device, initiating/receiving a call, and verifying the app's awareness of that call state on the Home screen.
No test case validates that DFU (firmware update) is blocked during an active call on Morpheus devices. This is a critical safety/UX requirement.

No test case validates that ANC or Transparency Mode changes are blocked during an active call on Morpheus devices. The bug specifically calls out that changes to these settings should be prevented during a call.

No test case covers device-specific behavior for Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) regarding call state awareness. The existing test 65641606 covers Conversation Limiting settings being locked during a call, but that is a different feature and does not test DFU blocking or ANC/Transparency blocking on Morpheus.
No test case validates the app's Home screen behavior/indicators during an active call on a Morpheus device (e.g., does the UI show a call-active state, disable certain controls, etc.).
No test case covers the state transition: entering a call -> verifying blocked operations -> ending call -> verifying operations become unblocked on Morpheus devices.
No test case covers iOS-specific call state detection differences (e.g., how iOS reports call state via AVAudioSession vs. Android Telephony) for Morpheus devices.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-001: Verify Poly Studio Mobile iOS app detects active call state on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) via Home screen indicator
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device via Bluetooth.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap the connected [Voyager 4245 Office] device tile on the Home screen to enter the device detail screen.
Verify the Home screen shows the device as 'Connected' with battery level and device name.
Minimize the app (press Home button) and place an outgoing call from the iOS native Phone app to a test number.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (tap app icon).
Observe the Home screen and device detail screen for any call-state indicator (e.g., 'On a call' badge, phone icon overlay, or disabled controls).
Verify that the app UI reflects the active call state (e.g., a call-active banner, icon, or status text appears on the device tile or detail screen).
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS correctly detects and displays the active call state on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) device. The Home screen or device detail screen shows a visual indicator (e.g., 'On a call' badge, phone icon, or status text) confirming the app is aware of the ongoing call.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-002: Verify DFU (Firmware Update) is blocked during an active call on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device. A firmware update package is available (or a mock DFU screen is accessible).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap [Voyager 4245 Office] → Settings → Firmware Update (or Software Update).
Verify the Firmware Update screen shows available update info.
Press the Home button to background the app.
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app to a test number.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update.
Attempt to tap 'Update Now' or 'Install' to start the firmware update process.
Observe the app behavior: does it allow the update to proceed or block it with a message?
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app blocks the firmware update (DFU) during an active call on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). A clear user-facing message is displayed (e.g., 'Cannot update during a call' or 'End call to update firmware'), and the 'Update Now' button is disabled or non-functional.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-003: Verify ANC changes are blocked during an active call on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap [Voyager 4245 Office] → Audio Settings → ANC (Active Noise Cancellation).
Verify the ANC slider is adjustable and functional when NOT on a call (set to a mid value like 50 to confirm).
Press the Home button to background the app.
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app to a test number.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC.
Attempt to adjust the ANC slider (e.g., drag from 50 to 80).
Observe whether the slider moves and whether the change is applied to the headset.
generated_testcases.expected: The ANC slider is disabled or non-functional during an active call on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). The app may show a lock icon, grayed-out slider, or a message such as 'ANC unavailable during a call'. The ANC level does not change on the headset.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-004: Verify Transparency Mode changes are blocked during an active call on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap [Voyager 4245 Office] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Verify Transparency Mode toggle and sub-settings (Environment/Speech) are adjustable when NOT on a call.
Set Transparency Mode to ON and set Surround level to 60, Free level to 40.
Press the Home button to background the app.
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app to a test number.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
Attempt to toggle Transparency Mode OFF, or adjust Surround level slider, or adjust Free level slider.
Observe whether the changes are accepted or blocked.
generated_testcases.expected: Transparency Mode changes (toggle ON/OFF, Surround level, Free level adjustments) are blocked during an active call on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). Controls are disabled, grayed out, or show a message indicating unavailability during a call.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-005: Verify call-aware alerts are suppressed during an active call on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap [Voyager 4245 Office] → Settings → Notifications / Alerts.
Note the current alert settings (e.g., low battery alerts, connection alerts).
Press the Home button to background the app.
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app to a test number.
While on the call, trigger a condition that would normally generate an in-app alert (e.g., reduce headset battery to low level, or simulate a Bluetooth reconnection event).
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe whether any alert banners, pop-ups, or notification toasts appear during the active call.
generated_testcases.expected: Call-aware alerts (e.g., low battery warnings, connection notifications) are suppressed or deferred during an active call on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). No intrusive alert UI appears that would disrupt the call experience.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-006: Verify state transition — entering call blocks operations, ending call unblocks operations on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap [Voyager 4245 Office] → Audio Settings → ANC.
Verify ANC slider is adjustable (set to 50).
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Audio Settings → ANC.
Verify ANC slider is disabled/grayed out. Attempt to adjust it — confirm it is blocked.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode. Verify controls are blocked.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update. Verify 'Update Now' is blocked.
End the call from the iOS native Phone app.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify the slider is now adjustable.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and verify controls are adjustable.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update and verify 'Update Now' is tappable.
generated_testcases.expected: The app correctly transitions between call-aware states: during an active call, ANC, Transparency Mode, and DFU are blocked. After the call ends, all operations become unblocked and fully functional again on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus).

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-007: Verify call state detection works for incoming calls on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Tap [Voyager 4245 Office] to enter the device detail screen.
From a second phone, place an incoming call to the iOS device connected to the Morpheus headset.
Answer the call on the headset (tap the headset call button).
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home screen and device detail screen for call-state indicators.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify it is blocked.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and verify it is blocked.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update and verify it is blocked.
End the call from the headset.
Return to the app and verify all controls are unblocked.
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app correctly detects incoming call state on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). ANC, Transparency Mode, and DFU are blocked during the incoming call. After the call ends, all controls are restored to normal functionality.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-008: Verify call state detection survives app backgrounding and foregrounding on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and confirm call state is detected (ANC blocked).
Press the Home button to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen the app by tapping the app icon.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify it is still blocked.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and verify it is still blocked.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update and verify it is still blocked.
Force-kill the app (swipe up from app switcher).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Verify the app reconnects to the Morpheus device.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify it is still blocked (call is still active).
End the call.
Return to the app and verify all controls are unblocked.
generated_testcases.expected: The call state detection persists across app lifecycle events (backgrounding, foregrounding, force-kill and relaunch) on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). ANC, Transparency Mode, and DFU remain blocked as long as the call is active, and are restored after the call ends.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-009: Verify call state detection survives Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect during active call on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Place an active call from the iOS native Phone app.
Return to the app and confirm call state is detected (ANC blocked).
Disconnect Bluetooth on the iOS device (toggle Bluetooth OFF in Control Center or Settings).
Wait 5 seconds.
Re-enable Bluetooth on the iOS device.
Wait for the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) to automatically reconnect.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify it is still blocked (call is still active on the headset).
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and verify it is still blocked.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update and verify it is still blocked.
End the call.
Return to the app and verify all controls are unblocked.
generated_testcases.expected: The call state detection survives a Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect cycle on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). ANC, Transparency Mode, and DFU remain blocked after reconnection while the call is still active, and are restored after the call ends.

generated_testcases.title: TC-CALL-STATE-010: Verify call state detection works with multiple concurrent calls (call waiting) on Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus) is paired and connected to the iOS device. iOS call waiting is enabled.
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
Place an active call (Call A) from the iOS native Phone app.
Return to the app and confirm call state is detected (ANC blocked).
From a second phone, place an incoming call (Call B) to the iOS device.
Answer Call B (placing Call A on hold) using the headset.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify it is still blocked.
Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and verify it is still blocked.
Navigate to Settings → Firmware Update and verify it is still blocked.
Swap back to Call A (using headset or phone UI).
Return to the app and verify controls remain blocked.
End all calls.
Return to the app and verify all controls are unblocked.
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app correctly detects the active call state during multiple concurrent calls (call waiting scenario) on the Voyager 4245 Office (Morpheus). ANC, Transparency Mode, and DFU remain blocked regardless of which call is active, and are restored only after all calls end.
